prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 27189→27371→30989→33301→34567，整体呈持续后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 7200 名；2025 年基准约 34567 名，后移速度有所放缓但方向未变；该校在广东省物理类招生计划 2021 年 30 人、2022 年 32 人、2023 年 30 人、2024 年 33 人、2025 年 38 人、2026 年38 人，2026 年与 2025 年持平，未出现扩招或缩招信号，招生规模对竞争格局无额外影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 郑州大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021 年第 53 名→2026 年第 44 名，排名稳步提升反映综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有正面作用；2022 年声誉评价为明显负面（安徽/广西投档线暴跌、食堂投诉），2025 年偏负面（全国投档线溃败、黑龙江 389 分录取），2026 年偏负面（虐猫谣言舆情）；抖音总热度排名第 8（高热），短视频曝光量大但评价偏负面；投档异常 2022 年高关注、2025 年高关注，历史断档信号可能对报考心理产生滞后影响；第五轮学科评估数据未收录郑州大学，无法获取 A-/A/A+ 学科清单；据公开信息该校临床医学、材料科学与工程等为 B+ 学科，无 A 类学科，优势学科对位次上移的支撑有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（高热推荐→推荐，小幅降温）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程（高热推荐）等工科热门专业热度仍高，与郑州大学物理类招生专业（计算机、电子信息、自动化、临床医学等）匹配度高，有利于维持报考热度；广东省物理类考生数 2025 年 440208→2026 年 456000，增加约 3.6%，竞争加剧；郑州大学位于河南（非本省），在广东省无本地招生倾斜；university_enrollment_summary 中未收录郑州大学数据，无法获取 local_enrollment_share，地域偏好因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年招生计划持平、广东省物理类考生增加约 3.6% 加剧竞争、学校软科排名上升但声誉偏负面、工科热门专业维持报考热度等因素，在 2025 年基准 34567 名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约 35067 名，区间 34567–35567 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 自动化类（含电气工程及其自动化、自动化）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、通信工程）
- 临床医学（第五临床学院）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学）
- 口腔医学
- 法学
- 经济学（数智经济）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 34567–35567 名内，建议以二档专业（数学类、口腔医学、法学）为主力填报，一档专业（计算机、自动化、电子信息、临床医学）作为冲刺，三档专业（材料类、预防医学）作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<34567 名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 27189→27371→30989→33301→34567, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7200 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 34567, with the backward shift slowing but the direction unchanged; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong Province was 30 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 33 in 2024, 38 in 2025, and 38 in 2026, with 2026 remaining the same as 2025, showing no expansion or contraction signal, and the enrollment scale has no additional impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been steadily rising in recent years, from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and a positive effect on student attraction; in 2022, the reputation evaluation was clearly negative (sharp drop in admission scores in Anhui/Guangxi, cafeteria complaints), in 2025 it was somewhat negative (nationwide admission score collapse, 389 points admission in Heilongjiang), and in 2026 it was somewhat negative (rumors of cat abuse); total Douyin popularity ranked 8th (high heat), with high short video exposure but negative evaluations; admission anomalies in 2022 and 2025 received high attention, and historical cutoff signals may have a lagging effect on application psychology; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include Zhengzhou University, so A-/A/A+ discipline lists are unavailable; according to public information, the university's clinical medicine, materials science and engineering, etc., are B+ disciplines, with no A-class disciplines, and the support of advantageous disciplines for ranking improvement is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science (highly recommended→recommended, slight cooling), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Electrical Engineering (highly recommended) remain highly popular, matching well with Zhengzhou University's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, Clinical Medicine, etc.), which helps maintain application enthusiasm; the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province increased from 440208 in 2025 to 456000 in 2026, an increase of about 3.6%, intensifying competition; Zhengzhou University is located in Henan (not the home province), with no local enrollment preference in Guangdong; the university_enrollment_summary does not include Zhengzhou University data, so local_enrollment_share and regional preference factors are unavailable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the increase of about 3.6% in Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province intensifying competition, the rising Soft Science ranking but negative reputation, and the sustained popularity of engineering majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 34567; the predicted minimum ranking is about 35067, with a range of 34567–35567.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation (including Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Clinical Medicine (Fifth Clinical College).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Stomatology
- Law
- Economics (Digital Economy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (including Materials Science and Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering, Materials Chemistry)
- Preventive Medicine.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 34567–35567, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Stomatology, Law), use Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Automation, Electronic Information, Clinical Medicine) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Preventive Medicine) as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<34567), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 5065→4756→6189→6370→7278, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2500 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 7278, with a clear backward trend; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong Province was 5 in 2021, 3 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 9 in 2024, 13 in 2025, and 13 in 2026, with 2026 remaining the same as 2025, showing no signal of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science ranking in 2026 is 44th, with a continuous upward trend in recent years, indicating enhanced comprehensive strength; in 2022, its reputation was clearly negative (sharp drop in admission scores), in 2025 it was somewhat negative (nationwide admission score collapse), and in 2026 it is somewhat negative (public opinion incidents); its Douyin popularity ranks 8th overall (high heat), with high exposure but negative evaluations; historical cutoff signals may have a lagging effect on application psychology; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include Zhengzhou University, so the list of A-/A/A+ disciplines is unavailable; the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Journalism and Communication, Chinese Language and Literature, English) have no clear A-class discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (differentiated wait-and-see), Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese (recommended), English/Foreign Languages (generally wait-and-see); the overall popularity of History Category enrollment majors is differentiated, with Law and Chinese Language having some popularity but Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged; the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong Province increased from 292,200 in 2025 to 326,200 in 2026, an increase of about 11.6%, significantly intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose sharply from 428 in 2024 to 464 in 2025, reflecting intensified overall competition; Zhengzhou University is located in Henan (not the home province), with no local enrollment preference in Guangdong; university_enrollment_summary does not include Zhengzhou University data, indicating regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase of about 11.6% in History Category examinees in Guangdong Province, the sharp rise in the provincial control line reflecting intensified competition, the somewhat negative university reputation but rising Soft Science ranking, and other factors, competition is expected to intensify significantly based on the 2025 baseline of 7278; the predicted minimum ranking is about 7578, with a range of 7078–8078.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law
- Chinese Language and Literature (including Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese International Education).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Journalism and Communication (including Advertising, Journalism, Network and New Media).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7078–8078, it is recommended to take Tier 2 (Journalism and Communication) as the main choice, Tier 1 (Law, Chinese Language and Literature) as a reach, and Tier 3 (English) as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7078), focus on reaching for Law.
